revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ishitsukurino Shrine (Q135098983)
| native_name = 石作神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ishitsukurino Shrine (Q135098983)
| coordinates = {{coord|35.4931|136.225346}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ishitsukurino Shrine'''|石作神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province|ja|近江国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}}
** P155: {{ill|Q135039854|ltq=Q135039854|qid=Q135039854|1=Nokitano Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Tamatsukurino Shrine|lt=Tamatsukurino Shrine|qid=Q135098985|1=Tamatsukurino Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11585162|ltq=Q11585162|qid=Q11585162|1=Ishitsukuri Shrine, Tamatsukuri Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q843882|ltq=Q843882|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}}
* {{ill|Ika District, Shiga|lt=Ika district|en|Ika District, Shiga|it|Distretto di Ika|ja|伊香郡|ko|이카군|zh|伊香郡|qid=Q1042353|1=Ika District, Shiga}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.4931|136.225346}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181875
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}
